toolsPage.title: Financial tools

toolsPage.loginRequiredTitle: Please log in to access financial tools
toolsPage.loginRequiredBody: Create an account or sign in to use the full suite of tools.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Analyzer
portfolio.subtitle: Track your investments, monitor performance, and analyze your asset allocation.
portfolio.emptyBody: Add your first investment to begin tracking performance, gains/losses, and asset allocation. You can track stocks and cryptocurrencies.
portfolio.tipStocks: Use stock symbols like AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL
portfolio.tipCrypto: Use crypto symbols like BTC, ETH, SOL
portfolio.tipPrice: Enter the exact purchase price and quantity
portfolio.error: Failed to fetch portfolio data. Please try again later.

entries.title: Portfolio entries
entries.empty: No portfolio entries yet. Add your first investment using the form on the left.
entries.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{symbol}}?
